\tzpentry{ID3351}{Current Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3351 introduces Current Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} J_{ \text{ex}} = \frac{2t^2}{U} \exp \left[- \frac{2r}{a_0} \right] \end{equation}
